A '''battle''' took place on the [[Astronomer/Legends|astronomical]] object [[Tellanroaeg]] by the [[19 BBY/Legends|final year]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and the forces of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==The battle==
When the [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] received an urgent message through a secure [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] which was frequency-locked to a channel reserved for the Commander-in-Chief of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the clone commander ordered his troops to kill their [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]].

{{Battle-stub}}
